slides.headline: 5 calls you’re losing every week without realising.
slides.body: And how to catch every one. Swipe.

slides.headline: The on-the-tools call.
slides.body: Hands full, can’t answer. Catch it: an AI receptionist picks up in 2 rings every time.

slides.headline: The after-hours emergency.
slides.body: 9pm leaks book the plumber who answers at 9pm. Catch it: 24/7 cover, no night shift.

slides.headline: The “I’ll ring back” that never happens.
slides.body: Voicemail kills 80% of leads. Catch it: book the job on the first call, not the third.

slides.headline: The double-booked Monday.
slides.body: Two calls at once = one lost. Catch it: AI answers both, neither rings out.

slides.headline: The lunchtime quote chaser.
slides.body: They’re ringing round 3 trades on their break. First to answer wins. Catch it: be first.

slides.headline: You don’t need more leads. You need to stop losing the ones you’ve got.
How many are you losing?
slides.body: Free missed-call audit — link in bio.
slides.save: Save this — share it with a mate on the tools
